text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking down the hallway during lunch
break, I hear loud voices coming from the
stairway.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I am Horsegirl Lord Golshi! Bow down to me as I stand
perched atop the world! Desist!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No! I'm no follower of yours!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good question! Long story short: Golshi's
bein' the Horsegirl Lord.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She got hooked on this one RPG, and now she's
been role playing in person all day!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
For I am the Horsegirl Lord! The one who stands on
top! At the summit! Now then—you there!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The top is the strongest! The strongest is the top!
So answer me this, mortal: What does it take to
get there?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Th-the top is the strongest?! The strongest is the
top?! I got it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What you need is an unyielding heart! A burning
spirit! The caliente will to fight!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, easy there, tiger. What are you getting all
fired up for? You're not a little kid, y'know? Cool
it already...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Plebeian earthlings. You know nothing! Follow
me, and I shall teach you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I shall build my castle here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What comes with being at the top? A castle! I'll
build a castle and stand at the very top of it.
That'll make me the strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That'll make you... the strongest? I see... Makes
sense!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wait... But if you just wanna stand somewhere
high up, wouldn't the rooftop of the academy be
good enough?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa! Do you not wish to claim the top
yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you are indeed a condor, you must aim for the
skies! The blue peak... Don't you want the
mightiest throne for yourself?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh... The mightiest throne! Sí! I sure do!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then you'll need a castle! A grand fortress with
spires soaring high above mine own!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's survival of the fittest here... Strength is the
will to rise above others, for only then canst thou
change the world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeeeah! The strong! The transcendent! The
battle for the top! Things are heating up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right, let's get started! But first, what do we do
about the castle?

El Condor Pasa appears to be getting swept up in
Gold Ship's chaotic vibe. I suppose if I have to
give her some advice, then...
choice_data_list:
Maybe look for something you can use as the
castle?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Arrr! Looks like we'll need us a fishing boat, then!
One with cannons! We'll defeat the Great King
Squid and become the fishing kings, me matey!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No, wait, it'd probably be faster to just find some
hidden treasure. Yar-har! We be sailing the high
seas as pirates, then!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What happened to being the Horsegirl Lord?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come on, ye landlubber! Ye can hop onto me
ship, arrr!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The high seas await us! To the legendary island!
Anchors aweeeigh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! I-I'm not going anywhere! I don't want to
take to the se—AHHHHH?!

Gold Ship hoists up the reluctant El Condor Pasa
and sets sail. I watch them surge along the
Hallwayntic Ocean until at last, they dip below
the distant horizon...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Then I know just the place!

Gold Ship races over to the jungle gym, climbs to
the top, and raises her hand in a lofty manner.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bwahahaha! I am Horsegirl Lord Golshi! Come at me,
El Condor Pasa the hero!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hero?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Very well! As the world's strongest hero, I'm
gonna drag you from that throne!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Hey, what're you two doing?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I wanna play too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I see you've brought some of your underlings
to tip the scales! Excellent! Just try to catch me!
HUP!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you! You're Soldier A now, okay? Remember
your line?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Perfect!

I watch for a while as Gold Ship and El Condor
Pasa play out the battle of the Horsegirl Lord versus
the heroes.
